nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SR-(CLOSTRIDIUM BOTULINUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 JELLYFISH POLYPEPTIDE-1 HEXAPEPTIDE-40)
chemicalDescription: sr-(Clostridium Botulinum Polypeptide-1 Jellyfish Polypeptide-1 Hexapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from r-Clostridium Botulinum Polypeptide-1, sr-Jellyfish Polypeptide-1 and Hexapeptide-40. The fusion peptide contains 684 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

s-Octopus Hexapeptide-1 SP is a single chain peptide consisting of alanine, asparagine, lysine, tyrosine and valine. It is synthetically produced based on a sequence from the CAP Protein found in the octopus Hapalochlaena maculosa. The parent protein contains a maximum of 157 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Chlorella Vulgaris sh-Polypeptide-14 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced Chollera vulgaris after transformation with either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Nerve Growth Factor Beta. It contains a maximum of 53 amino acids, which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Stearyldisulfidehexyl sh-DNA-2 PEG-45/sh-RNA-1 is a synthetic human RNA strand conjugated with a synthetic human complementary DNA strand modified at the 5' end with Stearyldisulfidehexyl and at the 3' end with polyethylene glycol. The RNA is an androgen-receptor-specific siRNA comprised of 19 ribonucleotides. The modified DNA is a complementary strand comprised of 19 deoxyribonucleotides selected from the isoform-common region of human androgen receptor mRNAs isoform 1. This was developed for effective and specific degradation of mRNA coding androgen receptor.

s-Pea Oligopeptide-1 SP is a single chain protein synthetically produced based on a sequence from Seed Linoleate 9S-lipoxygenase-3 found in the plant, Pisum sativum. The parent protein contains a maximum of 861 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Pentapeptide-69 is a synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, asparagine, proline and tyrosine.
Cutibacterium Acnes Bacteriophages are the bacteriophages replicated in the microorganism Cutibacterium acnes.
Decapeptide-52 is a synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, glutamic acid, glycine, histidine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine and tryptophan.
Platycodon Grandiflorus Root Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the roots of Platycodon grandiflorus.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SEA WATER/NELUMBO NUCIFERA LEAF FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Sea Water/Nelumbo Nucifera Leaf Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of an extract of the product obtained by the spontaneous fermentation of Sea Water and the leaves of Nelumbo nucifera.
inciName: SEA WATER/NELUMBO NUCIFERA LEAF FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Lotus Corniculatus Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of Lotus corniculatus.
Prunus Domestica Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Prunus domestica. The accepted scientific name for Prunus domestica is Prunus x domestica.
Zanthoxylum Schinifolium Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Zanthoxylum schinifolium.
Hydrogenated Castor Oil/Adipic Acid Copolymer is the copolymer formed by the reaction of Hydrogenated Castor Oil with Adipic Acid.
Buddleja Davidii Callus Extract
Decapeptide-50 is a synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, aspartic acid, cysteine, glycine, leucine, and tryptophan.
Octapeptide-39 is the synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, glutamine, lysine, serine, threonine, tyrosine and valine.

s-Sea Anemone Heptapeptide-1 SP is a single chain peptide containing 7 amino acids consisting of arginine, cysteine, glutamine, lysine and threonine. It is synthetically produced based on a sequence from Kappa-stichotoxin-Hmg1a found in the sea anemone Heteractis magnifica. The parent protein contains a maximum of 74 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Nigella Damascena Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of Nigella damascena.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Cinnamomum Cassia Bark/(Jasmine/Osmanthus Fragrans) Flower/Lycium Chinense Fruit Extract
chemicalDescription: Cinnamomum Cassia Bark/(Jasmine/Osmanthus Fragrans) Flower/Lycium Chinense Fruit Extract is the extract of the bark of Cinnamomum cassia, the flowers of Jasminum sambac and Osmanthus fragrans and the fruit of Lycium chinense.
inciName: CINNAMOMUM CASSIA BARK/(JASMINE/OSMANTHUS FRAGRANS) FLOWER/LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: PEI-42 is the polymer of ethylenimine that conforms generally to the formula:
Morus Alba Root Bark Extract is the extract of the root bark of Morus alba.
Centipeda Minima Flower/Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the flowers, leaves and stems of Centipeda minima.
Decapeptide-48 is the synthetic peptide consisting of glycine, leucine, lysine, phenylalanine, serine, tyrosine and valine.
Octapeptide-38 is a synthetic peptide consisting of cysteine, glutamic acid, leucine and lysine.
Hexapeptide-73 is a synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, leucine, phenylalanine, proline and tryptophan.
Oligopeptide-176 is a synthetic peptide containing 12 amino acids consisting of arginine, glycine, lysine, methionine, proline, serine and valine.
